title: FBI’s Kash Patel denies excess drinking amid officials’ US security concerns
description: Agency director threatens to sue Atlantic for report citing allegations from two dozen current and former colleagues
content:
The FBI director, Kash Patel, is denying allegations detailed in a new report that he drinks to excess and has been unreachable at times during his tenure in office.
Patel threatened to sue the Atlantic over the story published on Friday, which detai... [2318 chars]

title: No more gimmicks: Coventry’s perilous journey back to the Premier League is finally over
description: Supporters and club insiders look back at the Sky Blues’ journey, from the depths of text-a-sub ridicule and fan mutinies to promotion
content:
To understand the extraordinarily wild ride that Coventry have been on, culminating in the promotion achieved at Blackburn on Friday night, you need only look at the text-a-substitute idea that has become part of football folklore.

title: Pope says 'tyrants' speech was not aimed at Trump
description: The pontiff says his remarks have been misinterpreted after a spat with the US president.
content:
Pope Leo has said he was not seeking to debate Donald Trump when he criticised "tyrants" for spending billions on wars in a speech earlier this week.
The pontiff said the remarks, which he delivered days after a high-profile spat with Trump, had been... [1890 chars]

title: Two killed after car apparently drives on wrong side of M90 in Perth and Kinross
description: Two men died at the scene after head-on motorway collision near Kincross, Police Scotland say
content:
Two drivers have died in a motorway crash in Scotland involving a car apparently travelling in the wrong direction on the carriageway, police have said.
The two men died at the scene of the collision on the M90 near Kinross, a town in Perth and Kinro... [867 chars]

title: Gunman shot dead by police after at least six killed in Kyiv shooting
description: The gunman opened fire before taking hostages and barricading himself in a nearby supermarket on Saturday. | ITV National News
content:
A gunman who killed at least six people in the streets of Kyiv has been shot dead by police, Ukrainian officials said.
The gunman opened fire before taking hostages and barricading himself in a nearby supermarket on Saturday.
